\tzpentry{ID5658}{Kinetic Term Scaling Law}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5658 introduces Kinetic Term Scaling Law as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} K_{p,i}\propto \frac{1}{(|r_i-a_p|+\varepsilon)^3}\approx 0, \end{equation}
